---
title: "PCA result"
format: pptx
editor: visual
---

## 

## PCA Results Summary

-   **Principal Components (PCs)**:
    -   PC1 explains **55.5%** of the variance\
    -   PC2 adds **14.3%** (cumulative **69.8%**)\
    -   PC3 adds **11.6%** (cumulative **81.4%**)
-   **Interpretation**:
    -   Workload dimensions cluster into **3 main components**\
    -   PC1 → **General workload intensity**\
    -   PC2 → **Performance vs. physical demand trade-off**\
    -   PC3 → **Mental demand vs. performance load**

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## PCA Loadings (Top Contributors)

-   **PC1**: wl_temporal (0.41), wl_physical (0.38), wl_frustration (0.47)\
-   **PC2**: wl_performance (-0.71), wl_physical (0.51)\
-   **PC3**: wl_mental (-0.59), wl_performance (0.49)
